meta_description: Christian action days at Berlin universities. Talks, workshops, and encounters on faith, life, and society.
hero_overtitle: Christian Action Days at Berlin Universities
about_text_1: The Hochschultage Berlin are Christian action days at various Berlin universities. Under the motto <strong>
, we invite you to explore life's big questions together.
about_text_2: Students and faculty of all disciplines and backgrounds are warmly welcome — whether you've been a believer for years, have questions, or are simply curious.
program_subtitle: Talks, workshops, and encounters at various locations across Berlin.
program_day1_event1_desc: Keynote and discussion to kick off the Hochschultage.
program_day2_event1_desc: How do faith and science fit together? An interactive workshop.
program_day2_event2_desc: Students and guests discuss the future, meaning, and hope.
program_day2_event3_desc: A relaxed evening with live music and good food.
program_day3_event1_desc: Closing talk with space for questions and connection.
program_tbd: More events will be announced soon.
whoweare_text: The Hochschultage Berlin are organized by a network of Christian student groups and organizations:
whoweare_org1_desc: A network of Christian student groups organizing action days at universities.
whoweare_org2_desc: A youth and student movement focused on community and faith.
whoweare_org3_desc: Student Mission in Germany — active at German universities for decades.
whoweare_org4_desc: Churches, student services, and other organizations support the Hochschultage.
contact_text: Are you part of a university group and want to get involved? Or do you have questions about the Hochschultage? Get in touch!
contact_groups_text: Want to join as a group? Reach out and we'll help you plan on-site activities.
contact_form_privacy: By submitting, you agree to our Privacy Policy.
popup_text: Your message has been sent. We'll get back to you as soon as possible.
popup_subtext: Want to learn more in the meantime? Follow us on Instagram.
volunteer_hero_subtitle: Become part of the team behind Hochschultage Berlin.
volunteer_reg_text: Want to help with the Hochschultage? Fill out the form and we'll be in touch.
volunteer_form_area_options: Please select|Setup & Tech|Hosting & MC|Music & Worship|Prayer|Catering|Welcome Team|Follow-up & Pastoral Care|Other
volunteer_form_privacy: By submitting, you agree to our Privacy Policy.
volunteer_program_text: In addition to the public program, there are exclusive sessions for volunteers:
volunteer_program_item3: Daily Morning Prayers — during the Hochschultage
volunteer_donate_text: The Hochschultage are largely funded by donations. If you'd like to support the project, every gift is appreciated.

datenschutz_text:
1. Responsible Party

[Enter name and contact details of responsible party]

2. Collection and Storage of Personal Data

When visiting our website, information is automatically collected by the server provider (server log files). This data cannot be attributed to specific individuals and is not merged with other data sources.

3. Contact Form

When you contact us via the contact form, the data you provide (name, email, message) is stored for the purpose of processing the inquiry. We do not share this data without your consent.

4. Cookies

Our website uses one cookie for language selection ("lang"). This cookie is technically necessary and does not contain personal data.

5. Your Rights

You have the right to request information, correction, deletion, and restriction of processing of your personal data at any time. Contact: info@aktionstage.berlin
